inputs.text: main thoda bukhar aur thakaan mehsoos kar rahi hoon

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: filhal koi visheshtibhut lakshan nahi hai jo tuberculosis ki ore ishara karein

inputs.text: meri khaansi shuru ho gayi hai, sookhi khaansi hai

hypotheses.rationale: sookhi khaansi bronchitis ke lakshan mein shamil hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis

inputs.text: meri khaansi 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai, raat ko bahut pasina aata hai aur wazan bhi kam ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: khaansi 2 hafte se zyada, raat ko pasina aur wazan kam hona tuberculosis ke cardenal lakshanon mein shamil hain

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: bronchitis mein itne lambe samay tak khaansi aur wazan kam hona aam nahi hai

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: pneumonia ke lakshanon mein yeh sabhi nahi shamil hote

inputs.text: meri halat bahut kharab ho gayi hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai aur khaansi mein kabhi-kabhi thodi si bleeding bhi ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: khaansi mein bleeding tuberculosis ki gharbhdashata ko badha deti hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: bronchitis mein itni gharbhdashata aur bleeding aam nahi hai

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: pneumonia ka ilaj shuru karne mein deri ho sakti hai lekin abhi tak ke lakshanon se pneumonia ka koi vishisht sanket nahi mila
